site.title: AquaDrom

site.description: Aliaksei Chapyzhenka watercolor gallery: seascapes, desert landscapes, still life. Contre-jour technique, plein air, nature sketches.
site.keywords: watercolor, gallery, landscape, seascape, still life, Dmitry Romanov, contre-jour, plein air

about.title: About Me
about.text1: Hi! I've been doing watercolors for many years. Most of all I love to paint water - ocean, sea, rivers. There is something magical in trying to capture the movement of water with watercolors.
about.text2: I live in America, but my soul often returns to seascapes. Each wave is a new story, a new challenge.
about.text3: Here I collect my work and share thoughts about the creative process.

meta.pageTitle: AquaDrom — Watercolor Gallery | Seascapes and Plein Air
meta.description: Dmitry Romanov watercolor gallery: seascapes in contre-jour technique, Arizona and Sedona desert landscapes, still life. Plein air painting and nature sketches.
meta.keywords: watercolor, gallery, watercolor painting, seascape, contre-jour, desert landscape, Sedona, Arizona, still life, plein air, Dmitry Romanov
